title: AssetTypeValues
description:
A functional Classification Hierarchy that distinguishes between objects of value according to some criteria.
Comment: BIAN Has developed a classification hierarchy, but also other authorities have defined classification hierarchies.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tangible Asset
x-enumeration-literals.description: It has a physical form and can be touched or seen.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Intangible Asset
x-enumeration-literals.description: It doesn't have a physical form but hold value

x-enumeration-literals.name: Operating Asset
x-enumeration-literals.description: Used in the day-to-day operations of the business.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Non-operating Asset
x-enumeration-literals.description: Not used in core business operations but still provide value

x-enumeration-literals.name: Current Asset
x-enumeration-literals.description: Expected to be converted into cash within one year.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Non-Current (Fixed) Asset
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provide value over the long term (more than one year).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Personal Asset
x-enumeration-literals.description: Owned by individuals and not related to a business.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Business Asset
x-enumeration-literals.description: Owned by a business and used to generate revenue.
